title: A Nice Spot
description: Trees lean out over the water at Balmoral. Sails dot the headland in the distance. The kind of afternoon you don't want to end.

title: Abstract Gold and Blue
description: Bold blocks of white, gold, blue and grey on a rich terracotta ground. Geometry that feels alive.

title: Abstract Park
description: Rolling countryside seen from above. A small farmhouse, bare trees and a lone figure caught in the vastness of an open landscape.

title: Sydney Harbour Abstract
description: An aerial view of the harbour distilled to colour and energy. The bridge sits at the heart of it, familiar even in abstraction.

title: Anywhere You Want
description: Tall slim trees on a green hillside, somewhere in the south of France. The kind of place that makes you want to stop the car.

title: Arno at Night
description: Florence after dark. The Arno stretches away into the night, lit by warm golden buildings on both sides and a full moon breaking through churning blue cloud.

title: Bali
description: A tropical squall over the sea. Rain falls in dots, waves churn green, and the sun burns through the top corner anyway.

title: Balmoral by Night
description: Looking across the water at night from Balmoral. City lights beyond the trees, a red cottage on the headland. Sydney doing what it does best.

title: Birds Eye View, Balmoral
description: Balmoral from above — the rotunda, the beach, the headland and the harbour opening beyond. A place as familiar as home.

title: Stuart's Tree
description: Inspired by an image taken by our friend Stuart near the house he and Carina own. The tree stands alone against that extraordinary Blue Mountains sky.

title: The Bush
description: A path winds through tall eucalypts. The bush is always a little dark, a little wild — and completely itself.

title: Coastline
description: A river meets the sea at dusk. The sky goes pink and the green banks hold the water for just a moment longer.

title: Colourful Colours
description: Blues and aquas wash across the canvas, split by a vivid gold horizon. Somewhere between landscape and pure feeling.

title: Dince's Place
description: Trees cast long shadows across a paddock in the afternoon sun. Spare, quiet, and very Australian.

title: Drying My Wings
description: A cormorant spreads its wings on a rocky ledge while the sea churns around it. It has done this before. It will do it again.

title: Eastern End, Balmoral
description: Bright little sailing dinghies lined up at the eastern end of Balmoral. Rain coming in, colour everywhere.

title: Em's Place
description: Bare winter trees along a country lane as the sun goes down. The sky catches fire and the world goes quiet.

title: Enjoying the View, Balmoral
description: Two people sit on a rock overlooking the lagoon at Balmoral. The beach curves away, the trees are full and green, and there is nowhere better to be.

title: Fig Tree, Balmoral
description: The great Moreton Bay fig at Balmoral. Ancient, generous and completely at home at the water's edge.

title: Hyde Park
description: Looking south down the great avenue of Hyde Park toward the Archibald Fountain. The city holds its breath in the canopy above.

title: Isle-sur-la-Sorgue
description: The river rushes through the antique village of L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue in Provence. Flowers spill over the banks, a terracotta house watches from above.

title: Japanese Garden
description: A deep blue pond in a lush Japanese garden. A pavilion sits in the distance, cherry blossoms at the edge, the sky full of movement.

title: Kyoto Forest
description: Ancient cedars and mossy boulders in a Kyoto forest. Light filters through the canopy and birds scatter across the clearing.

title: Middle of Nowhere
description: An open sandflat, a line of deep blue water, a small figure and a vast sky. The footprints are the only sign anyone was ever here.

title: Norfolk Island
description: The distinctive silhouette of a Norfolk Island pine against an open harbour. Remote, serene, and quietly beautiful.

title: North Head from Balmoral
description: The sky explodes in every direction over North Head. The headland holds its ground below while the atmosphere above does whatever it wants.

title: Opera House, Emerald City
description: Sydney from the water, the way it sits in your memory. The Opera House rising out of a green harbour, the city humming behind it.

title: Opera House and Luna Park
description: The Opera House in the foreground, the Harbour Bridge arcing behind, and Luna Park's smiling face glowing in the distance. Everything Sydney in one view.

title: Outback River
description: An irrigation channel cuts through green outback country under a wide blue sky. Water in the landscape changes everything.

title: Outback Sunset
description: Fire across the outback sky. A lone tree on the red earth, the scrub catching the last light. The Australian interior at its most raw and beautiful.

title: Sunset, San Sebastián
description: The sun goes down over the Bay of Biscay. The sea turns gold, the clouds layer in amber and brown, and rocks break the surface like dark promises.

title: Sydney Harbour Fireworks
description: The harbour lit up — Opera House, Bridge, fireworks bursting from the sky in streaks of colour. Sydney celebrating itself.

title: Sydney Harbour Bridge
description: The Bridge in early morning light, soft and hazy over still water. The Opera House waits in the mist behind. There is nothing quite like this in the world.

title: Town on a Hill
description: A Tuscan hill town perched above the valley, warm terracotta against rolling green. The kind of view that stays with you.

title: Van Carey
description: White sails on a harbour painted with Van Gogh's energy. The sea swirls, the sky moves, and the boats are perfectly at home in it all.

title: Waves
description: Thick impasto waves break against a headland. The paint itself becomes water — churning, catching light, relentless.

title: White
description: A snow-covered landscape with a winding track disappearing into white hills. Cold, still, and unexpectedly peaceful.
